_comment: Per-bot config. Place at ~/.xclaw/<id>/config.json. Holds this bot's token + overrides. data/ is a derived sibling — do not set it. The bot's persona/behavior lives in SOUL.md + AGENTS.md in this same dir.

agent._comment_gateway: Model-gateway routing, mapped to ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL / ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN for the claude CLI.
agent._comment_env: Extra env vars injected into THIS bot's agent CLI. Per-bot identity vars like OCTO_BOT_ID belong here (never in the global config — that would give every bot the same id). Globally-shared vars can go in the global config's agent.env; per-bot entries merge over them by key.
